fields.name: statementPrefix
fields.label: Statement — opening text
fields.description: Text before "Beyond the Badge" (include trailing space)

fields.name: statementLine1
fields.label: Statement — line 1 text (after brand name)
fields.description: Text after "Beyond the Badge" up to the line break (e.g. ", we believe cultural")

fields.name: statementLine2
fields.label: Statement — line 2 text
fields.description: Text on the second line (e.g. "relevance isn't earned through logos.")

fields.name: marqueeItems
fields.label: Marquee items
fields.description: Services listed in the scrolling ticker tape

fields.name: quoteBefore
fields.label: Quote — opening text
fields.description: Text before the italic highlight phrase

fields.name: popupImages
fields.label: Full story popup images (max 5)
fields.description: Shown in the left column of the full story modal

fields.name: campaignVideoMp4
fields.label: Campaign video — MP4 path (leave blank to hide Play button)

fields.name: campaignVideoLabel
fields.label: Campaign video — accessibility label
fields.description: e.g. "Play EON Bond film campaign video"

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
